title: Simple Tuff Recipe
description: Adds a simple crafting recipe for tuff to the game (It's made using MCreator, please check it out)
body:
![Simple Tuff Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6563f8ec5848c6e210844115d5ada3784694b47b.png)
 

The Simple Tuff Recipe is a simple yet useful Minecraft modification that adds a crafting recipe for the Tuff block! No more searching deep underground to get your hands on this versatile building material. Now you can craft Tuff directly from common resources!

 

Features:
- Adds a crafting recipe to create Tuff blocks.
- The recipe uses easily obtainable materials, making Tuff more accessible.
- Compatible with Minecraft version 1.19.2; 1.20.1* (may more in future)
- Created using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/), a powerful and user-friendly modding tool.
- Also works with the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

*Also in Fabric


Whether you're looking to enhance your building options or simply want a reliable way to get Tuff without extensive mining, this mod has you covered!


Download the Simple Tuff Recipe today and add a new layer of convenience to your Minecraft experience!
